title: schoenoplectus × kalmussii
intro: Schoenoplectus × kalmussii, also known as Kalmus sedge, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the cattail family and is typically found in wetland environments. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Schoenoplectus × kalmussii include reducing inflammation, promoting skin healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into salves, ointments, and infusions, which can be used topically to aid in the healing process and soothe skin irritations.
